highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 1.54.1 is a servicing release that tightens SKMatrix and the disposable object hierarchy.

breaking.title: SKMatrix fields removed
breaking.body: SKMatrix no longer exposes its ScaleX/ScaleY, SkewX/SkewY, TransX/TransY and Persp0/Persp1/Persp2 fields directly — use the matrix constructors and helper APIs instead.

breaking.title: Dispose overrides removed on SKObject and path iterators
breaking.body: The explicit Dispose() overrides and finalizers on SKObject, SKPath.Iterator and SKPath.RawIterator were removed. Disposal now flows through the standard IDisposable pattern inherited from the base type.

bullets.detail: Removes duplicate Dispose overrides and finalizers on SKObject and the SKPath iterators so lifecycle flows through a single base implementation.
